name: Scampi-Style Chicken Thighs
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the chicken thighs.
2. Rinse the chicken with cold water and pat dry.
3. Place the chicken in a shallow container. Pour lemon juice over the chicken and let stand for 20 minutes.
4. In a small bowl, combine parsley and the remaining ingredients; stir well.
5. Spray the rack of a broiler pan with Pam cooking spray.
6. Remove the chicken from the lemon juice mixture, discarding the lemon juice.
7. Arrange the chicken on the rack and brush with the parsley mixture.
8. Broil 6 inches from the heating element for 4 minutes on each side or until tender.
9. Transfer the chicken to a serving platter. Garnish with lemon wedges and parsley if desired.
PER SERVING: 218 calories, 19.4 g protein, 14.3 g fat, 2 g carbohydrates, 70 g cholesterol, 1.1 mg iron, 100 mg sodium, 16 mg calcium.
